name: Picante Super Skillet Nachos
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz) pinto or black beans, rinsed and drained
Tortilla chips and/or Warmed flour tortillas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-inch skillet, brown the ground beef and onion together; drain excess fat.
2. Add Pace Picante Sauce, beans, and chili powder to the skillet. Bring mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and let simmer uncovered for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in chopped tomato, diced avocado, and sliced olives.
5. Remove from heat and sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese over the top.
6. Spoon sour cream onto the center of the meat mixture.
7. Place a row of tortilla chips around the edge of the skillet.
8. Serve immediately with additional tortilla chips, flour tortillas, and extra Pace Picante Sauce.
